Are you new to upwork ? Or are you new to the use of Wix? She's your best plug for this, highly recommended

feedback.comment: Great work delivered on time with a clear and professional report. The engineer thoroughly reviewed the project, confirmed the structural safety, and ensured everything meets building code requirements. Very satisfied with the quality and would recommend their services.

feedbackToClient.comment: I enjoyed working on this project. All expectations and requirements were communicated up front and the client was responsive to any of my requests for clarification. I liked working with her and hope to have the opportunity to work with her again.

feedback.comment: Kemisola absolutely nailed my character concept! The illustrations were vibrant, detailed, and captured the personality I wanted. Communication was super smooth, and she delivered ahead of schedule. Highly recommend!

feedback.comment: Outstanding experience working with this eLearning Developer & Instructional Designer. They transformed our PowerPoint into a highly interactive Articulate Rise 360 course with excellent structure, engaging knowledge checks, and clean design. Communication was clear, delivery was on time, and the final SCORM package worked perfectly in our LMS. Highly recommended for anyone needing professional eLearning development.

feedbackToClient.comment: I convert PowerPoint into interactive SCORM courses with engaging layouts, quizzes, and knowledge checks. Ready to deliver structured, learner-focused training. Thanks for the collaboration.

feedbackToClient.comment: He is easy to work with.

jobInfo.title: Fix Responsive Issues on Wix Website

feedback.comment: Mary did an outstanding job on our WordPress website. She built the site using Elementor Pro with a clean layout, responsive design, and very smooth user experience. The website loads fast and she also handled the on-page SEO setup properly. Communication was clear throughout the project and she delivered exactly what we needed. If you need a reliable WordPress developer who understands Elementor and website performance, Mary is a great choice. Highly recommended!

jobInfo.title: WordPress Developer & Elementor Expert Needed (Elementor Pro, Speed Optimization, SEO)

feedback.comment: Priscilla did a great job fixing a small issue on my Framer site. The form layout was shifting on mobile when users tapped the input field, and she quickly identified the problem and resolved it. Communication was clear throughout the process and she completed the fix faster than expected. Everything now works perfectly across mobile screens. I’d definitely recommend her for Framer fixes and would work with her again.

jobInfo.title: Responsive Form Layout Fix in Framer – Mobile Optimization

feedback.comment: She helped manage my social media as my brand was growing, and she did an excellent job. Communication was smooth and the results were very good.

jobInfo.title: Social Media Manager Needed for Growing Brand

feedback.comment: Janet did an excellent job resolving the issue. She was quick, professional, and clearly knows her way around Wix. The form submission problem was fixed efficiently, and everything is now working smoothly. Really appreciate the prompt support and clear communication. Highly recommended.

feedbackToClient.comment: It was nice working with him

jobInfo.title: Wix Expert Needed to Fix Form Submission Issue

feedback.comment: I’m very satisfied with the funnel design service delivered for my GoHighLevel project. The freelancer did an excellent job setting up a clean and functional sales funnel that captures leads effectively. The landing page was simple, well-structured, and clearly focused on the call-to-action.

jobInfo.title: Simple GoHighLevel Sales Funnel Setup

feedback.comment:
Collins did an excellent job setting up our Make.com automation for lead capture and CRM updates. He connected our form submissions, automated the data flow into our CRM, and added Slack notifications so our team can respond to new leads instantly.

What stood out was how quickly he understood the workflow and handled the API integration and automation logic without any issues. The system now automatically routes lead data into our tools and logs everything into Google Sheets, which has already improved our lead generation process and removed a lot of manual work.

Communication was clear, the turnaround was fast, and the automation works perfectly. If you need someone experienced with Make.com, Zapier, n8n, workflow automation, or CRM integrations, I highly recommend working with Collins.

feedbackToClient.comment: I really had a great experience working with Joshua.

jobInfo.title: Make.com Automation Expert Needed for Lead Capture & CRM Update

feedback.comment:
Isaac Nkwachukwu did a great job creating a clear and strategic 3-day content plan for our campaign. She showed a strong understanding of our target audience and delivered engaging hooks, well-structured captions, and smart visual format suggestions.
She was also very responsive to feedback and quickly adjusted the tone to make the content more conversational and effective for social media.
Overall, Nkwachukwu was professional, creative, and easy to work with. I would definitely recommend her.

feedbackToClient.comment: Working with Joshua was an absolute pleasure. He provided clear guidance, constructive feedback, and gave me the creative freedom I needed to deliver the best results. His communication was prompt and professional, making the project smooth and enjoyable. I truly appreciate his collaborative approach and would happily work with him again. Highly recommended!

jobInfo.title: Social Media Growth Strategist & Content Planner

feedback.comment:
Aminat did an excellent job ghostwriting my nonfiction ebook. She took the outline and developed it into a clear, well-structured manuscript with a consistent and engaging tone throughout. Communication was smooth, updates were provided regularly, and the final delivery exceeded my expectations. I’m very happy with the outcome and would definitely recommend working with her.

Thank you again for the great collaboration!

feedbackToClient.comment: Great client to work with. The project details and outline were clearly provided, and communication was smooth throughout the process. I appreciate the opportunity to work on this ebook and would gladly work together again.

Title
Ghostwriter for Nonfiction Ebook Project
Description

feedback.comment: Working with Emmanuel was an excellent experience from start to finish. He demonstrated strong expertise in Wix, Wix Website Design, and Web Development, quickly improving the Landing Page layout, responsiveness, and overall Web Design quality. His approach to Custom Web Design, Graphic Design, and Usability Testing helped refine the user experience. Emmanuel also handled Wix SEO Optimization and adjustments in Wix Editor, showing real skill as a Wix Expert and Wix Developer. He communicated clearly, delivered fast, and even suggested improvements related to Wix Studio, Wix Harmony, and Wix ecommerce development. Highly recommend for any Wix Redesign project.

jobInfo.title: Wix Website Designer Needed for Quick Landing Page Fix

feedback.comment:
Samuel did an excellent job helping with the formatting of our Word document template. He ensured that everything was properly aligned and structured, making the document look clean, consistent, and professional.

He paid great attention to detail and made sure the layout, spacing, and formatting were all correct throughout the document. Communication was smooth, and the work was completed efficiently.

I would definitely recommend Samuel to anyone who needs help with Word document formatting or template creation.

jobInfo.title: Word document formatting and book editing services

feedback.comment: Oluwatobi provided a detailed review of my course landing page and gave excellent suggestions to improve the flow and messaging. His feedback was clear, actionable, and very helpful. Great communication and timely delivery. Highly recommended!

feedbackToClient.comment: Thank you for choosing my service

jobInfo.title: Review my Online Course Landing Page

feedback.comment:
I had and excellent experience with Serifat, she is very easy to communicate with, and she delivered my Figma-to-Wix section perfectly without needing revisions. The layout was clean and fully responsive. I’d definitely love to hire her again.

Highly recommended

jobInfo.title: Redesign & Convert Figma design into Wix – Skilled Wix website  Designer Needed

job.description:
We are looking for an experienced n8n automation expert who can help us design and build reliable workflows that automate repetitive business tasks and connect multiple tools together.

Our goal is to eliminate manual work and create a system where our tools communicate automatically. This will include integrations between platforms such as Google Sheets, CRM systems, email tools, APIs, and other SaaS platforms.

The ideal candidate should be comfortable working with API integrations, webhook triggers, error handling, and building scalable workflows inside n8n.

info.title:
n8n Automation Expert Needed
 to Build Scalable Workflow Automation System
